items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend 2–3 weeks for weekends and 1 week for weekdays. For special occasions, 4–6 weeks ensures availability.

items.question: What is your cancellation policy?
items.answer: Cancellations made 48 hours in advance incur no charge. Late cancellations may be subject to a $25 per person fee.

items.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
items.answer: We hold a small number of tables for walk-in guests. We recommend arriving before 6:00 PM for the best availability.

items.question: Do you accommodate large parties?
items.answer: For parties of 8 or more, please contact us directly to arrange a group reservation. For 15+ guests, our private dining team can create a bespoke experience.

items.question: Can I request a specific table?
items.answer: We accommodate table preferences whenever possible. Please note your preference in the special requests field when booking.

items.question: Is there a dress code?
items.answer: Smart casual. We ask guests to avoid athletic wear and flip-flops. We welcome guests to dress up if the occasion calls for it.

items.question: Do you offer vegetarian or vegan options?
items.answer: Yes. Every menu includes at least three vegetarian and two vegan dishes. Our kitchen is happy to adapt most dishes — just let your server know.

items.question: How do you handle food allergies?
items.answer: Every dish on our menu is tagged with major allergens. Please inform your server of any allergies and we will ensure your meal is safe and delicious.

items.question: Does the menu change seasonally?
items.answer: Our dinner and tasting menus evolve with the seasons. Expect new dishes roughly every 6–8 weeks, with some signature items available year-round.

items.question: Can we arrange a custom tasting menu?
items.answer: Absolutely. For groups of 6 or more, Chef Bellamy can create a bespoke multi-course experience. Please contact us at least 2 weeks in advance.

items.question: Do you have a children's menu?
items.answer: While we don't have a formal children's menu, our kitchen is happy to prepare simpler dishes for younger guests. Please let us know when booking.

items.question: How many guests can you accommodate for a private event?
items.answer: The Salon accommodates 12–18 guests and The Library seats up to 40. For cocktail receptions, The Library can host up to 60 standing.

items.question: Can we bring our own cake for a celebration?
items.answer: Of course! There is no corkage or cake-cutting fee. You are also welcome to order from our pastry team — Chef Vasquez creates stunning celebration cakes.

items.question: Do you offer AV equipment for corporate events?
items.answer: The Library is equipped with a projector, screen, and wireless microphone. A tech setup fee of $150 applies and includes setup assistance.

items.question: What is the deposit for private dining?
items.answer: We require a 50% deposit at the time of booking, with the balance due on the day of the event. Deposits are fully refundable if cancelled 14 days in advance.

items.question: Is parking available nearby?
items.answer: Several parking garages are within a 2-minute walk. We also offer a complimentary valet service on Friday and Saturday evenings.

items.question: What is the nearest subway station?
items.answer: The 72nd Street station (1/2/3 lines) is a 4-minute walk from The Meridian.

items.question: Is the restaurant wheelchair accessible?
items.answer: Yes. Our main entrance, dining room, restrooms, and private dining rooms are all fully wheelchair accessible.

items.question: Do you offer gift cards?
items.answer: Yes! Digital and physical gift cards are available in any amount from $50 to $500. Visit our Gift Cards page or purchase at the host stand.

items.question: Can I purchase merchandise?
items.answer: We offer a small selection of branded items including aprons, tote bags, and our house-made hot sauce. Available at the host stand and online soon.

items.question: Do you cater off-site events?
items.answer: While our primary focus is the dining room, we occasionally cater exclusive off-site events. Please contact our events team to discuss your needs.

contact.headline: Can't find what you're looking for?
